title: Compiler submodule bump for code quality improvements

source.subject: fix: add references/bsharp to .gitmodules with update=none

body:
Compiler submodule bump for code quality improvements

## Scope

Land compiler quality/refactor bumps on main, then close v0.4 corelib by replacing remaining stubs and proving corelib-quality + pckg publish on main.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`c8e5fc4`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/c8e5fc4)
- **Subject:** fix: add references/bsharp to .gitmodules with update=none
- **Catalog tip:** [`c8e5fc4`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/c8e5fc4) (v0.4 cutoff 2026-05-27)
- **Status:** In Progress

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4 (Platform services, auth, and delivery tooling)
- **Workstream:** `compiler-corelib`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-corelib-complete`

## Landed

Superrepo pins compiler with quality/refactor commits; corelib stub completion and api.json parity remain for v0.4 closure.

## Remaining

- Replace remaining corelib stubs with Standard implementations
- Green corelib-quality workflow on main with pckg publish evidence
